# Website: https://symbiotvvce.in/

# Allow all search engine crawlers
User-agent: *
Allow: /
Allow: /sitemap.xml
Allow: /symbiot-2026-logo.png
Allow: /logo.png

# Block unnecessary assets from being indexed
Disallow: /assets/
Disallow: /PPT_template/

# Specific crawler permissions
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /

User-agent: Googlebot-Image
Allow: /

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /

# Sitemap location
Sitemap: https://symbiotvvce.in/sitemap.xml

# Host
Host: https://symbiotvvce.in
